name: rtk
description: Codex plugin for installing Rust Token Killer.

interface.shortDescription: Install RTK and initialize its Codex integration.
interface.longDescription: Installs the RTK CLI and runs the global Codex init step so Codex can use RTK for token reduction.
defaultPrompt: Use the rtk-install skill to install RTK for Codex on this machine, run the global Codex init step `rtk init -g --codex`, and verify it with `rtk init -g --codex --show`.
